description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the r-base Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq and installs git, pandoc, libxml2-dev, libcurl4-openssl-dev, libssl-dev, libgit2-dev, libfontconfig1-dev, libharfbuzz-dev, libfribidi-dev, libfreetype6-dev, libpng-dev, libtiff5-dev, libjpeg-dev. Define a single test job that executes the following script steps: Rscript -e 'install.packages(c(\"xml2\", \"openxlsx\", \"devtools\", \"roxygen2\", \"testthat\", \"covr\"))', Rscript -e 'devtools::install_dev_deps()', R CMD build . --no-build-vignettes --no-manual, PKG_FILE_NAME=$(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1), R CMD check "${PKG_FILE_NAME}" --no-build-vignettes --no-manual, and Rscript -e 'covr::codecov(token = \"bd5cfa37-91c5-4f29-a8f5-bf942ae22f55\")'. The job runs in the default stage with no additional rules or artifacts.
